string.text: Proprietary 30-round magazine for the first generation of AUG rifles. Later variants have a magwell that adapts them to use the standard STANAG pattern.\n This particular magazine is fit for .300 AAC Blackout.
Swiss-made SG550 Magazine holding 30 rounds in .300 AAC Blackout. Compatible with the SIG SG553, though technically with other SIG rifles as well if they're also chambered for .300 Blackout.
